title: Live Force
description: This mod adds the Life Vial, which restores the player's health. The vial is given at the very start of the game and is always kept in the player's inventory.
body:
**Live Force** adds the _Life Vial_, a magical item that restores the player's health. The vial is given at the very start of the game and always stays in the inventory, allowing players to survive battles, explore dangerous areas, and face challenges without worrying about dying.
                                                                                              **The functions of this mod are simple for now:**
_- Vial:_  Given when creating a world. (In the future, I will add a setting so that it is not given for adding to quests). It has 4 phases, full, drunk, half-empty, and empty. Phase 1 is restored every minute. It may be changed for balance
_- Feather of Never:_ No functionality, just exists
